state.next-action: 2026-04-18 follow-up sweep: (1) v1.35.0 tarball recovered — `npm pack` produced `get-anything-done-1.35.0.tgz` (1.8 MB packed, sha fc865025), `gh release upload v1.35.0 ./get-anything-done-1.35.0.tgz --clobber` succeeded, `gh release view v1.35.0` now lists the tgz alongside the three Bun binaries + install ps1 + INSTALL.txt; `/gad:update` for users on <1.35.0 now succeeds end-to-end. Note `2026-04-18-v1.35.0-missing-npm-tarball.md` updated with the recovery record. (2) Smart-quote attributes in TASK-REGISTRY.xml (lines 1690 + 1694 — tasks 44.5-02b and 44.5-03) replaced with straight ASCII so the graph extractor stops surfacing them as empty-ID planned entries; `gad graph build` rebuilt clean (1020 nodes, 1549 edges) and `gad tasks --status planned` dropped from 10 → 9 well-formed entries. Root-caused (and previously fixed) by 63-graph-task-stale; the smart-quote source data was the trigger. (3) Closed 46-15 (submodule audit) — wrote `references/submodule-audit-2026-04.md`: all 7 monorepo submodules KEEP (grime-time-site, mb-cli-framework, get-anything-done, projects/magicborn, openclaw, claw-code, opencode-gad), 0 INLINE, 0 DROP. `repub-builder` was a phantom in the task wording (never registered, conflated with repo-planner per gad-06-01). Adjacent finding: stray un-registered git tree at `tmp/openai-codex/` breaks `git submodule status` — captured for operator decision in `.planning/notes/2026-04-18-stray-openai-codex-tree.md`. Open follow-up notes: `2026-04-18-findings-belong-in-docs-site.md` and `2026-04-18-stray-openai-codex-tree.md`. Planned queue: 21-23b (legacy retry — defer), 35-10 (deep architectural review), 44-13 (delegated to claude lane), 44-28/32/33/34 (installer + portable Node + site packaging — large multi-phase), 45-21 (README copy pass), nothing else. Next: pick from 44-28/32/33/34 if multi-phase appetite, else queue is at a natural pause point.
